title: Airstrike attack
title_en: Airstrike attack
title_uk: Авіаційна атака
description: Ukraine will resume pumping oil through the Druzhba pipeline tomorrow, - Reuters According to the agency's source, the launch is scheduled for the second half of the day. The first application for transit was submitted by the Hungarian company MOL - the oil will be sent to Hungary and Slovakia. Earlier, Zelensky reported that the repair work on the "Druzhby" site, which was damaged by the Russian strike, had been completed.
description_en: Ukraine will resume pumping oil through the Druzhba pipeline tomorrow, - Reuters According to the agency's source, the launch is scheduled for the second half of the day. The first application for transit was submitted by the Hungarian company MOL - the oil will be sent to Hungary and Slovakia. Earlier, Zelensky reported that the repair work on the "Druzhby" site, which was damaged by the Russian strike, had been completed.
description_uk: Украина возобновит прокачку нефти по трубопроводу "Дружба" уже завтра, - Reuters Как сообщает источник агентства, запуск запланирован на вторую половину дня. Первую заявку на транзит подала венгерская компания MOL - нефть направят в Венгрию и Словакию. Ранее Зеленский сообщил, что был завершен ремонт на участке "Дружбы", который был поврежден российским ударом.

title: Drone attack on infrastructure
title_en: Drone attack on infrastructure
title_uk: Атака безпілотників на інфраструктуру
description: 🛢 Two Russian refineries stopped after UAV strikes, - Reuters Agency reports with reference to sources that Rosneft's Tuapsinsk and Novokuybyshevsk plants have resumed work. The first one has not been working since April 16 due to damaged ports and tanks, the second one stopped on April 18 after the attack, key installations were disabled. Against the background of attacks on infrastructure, the Russian Federation also reduced oil production - this is...
description_en: 🛢 Two Russian refineries stopped after UAV strikes, - Reuters Agency reports with reference to sources that Rosneft's Tuapsinsk and Novokuybyshevsk plants have resumed work. The first one has not been working since April 16 due to damaged ports and tanks, the second one stopped on April 18 after the attack, key installations were disabled. Against the background of attacks on infrastructure, the Russian Federation also reduced oil production - this is...
description_uk: 🛢 Два российских НПЗ остановились после ударов БПЛА, - Reuters Агентство со ссылкой на источники сообщает, что Туапсинский и Новокуйбышевский заводы "Роснефти" отсановили работу. Первый не работает с 16 апреля из-за повреждений порта и резервуаров, второй остановился 18 апреля после атаки, выведены из строя ключевые установки. На фоне ударов по инфраструктуре рф также сократила добычу нефти - это...

description: The Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Ukraine welcomes the adoption on April 21 by the UNESCO Executive Board at its 224th session of the regular decision "UNESCO Emergency Assistance Actions and Program for Ukraine". With this decision, the member states of the Executive Council confirmed their solidarity with Ukraine in countering the consequences of Russia's full-scale war against our country and called on the Director General of UNESCO to continue systematic...
description_en: The Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Ukraine welcomes the adoption on April 21 by the UNESCO Executive Board at its 224th session of the regular decision "UNESCO Emergency Assistance Actions and Program for Ukraine". With this decision, the member states of the Executive Council confirmed their solidarity with Ukraine in countering the consequences of Russia's full-scale war against our country and called on the Director General of UNESCO to continue systematic...

Цим рішенням держави-члени Виконавчої ради підтвердили солідарність з Україною у протидії наслідкам повномасштабної війни Росії проти нашої держави та закликали Генерального директора ЮНЕСКО продовжувати системний...

First: in the conditions of the crisis due to the war in Iran, it is important to fully fulfill the agreements regarding the supply of the necessary volumes of fuel to Ukraine. Volumes are secured for April and May. Second: already this week we are preparing a meeting in the format of an energy "Ramstein", and we need to speed up obtaining the necessary financing for renewable...
description_en: We discussed our priorities in energy cooperation with partners. First: in the conditions of the crisis due to the war in Iran, it is important to fully fulfill the agreements regarding the supply of the necessary volumes of fuel to Ukraine. Перше: в умовах кризи через війну в Ірані важливо виконати повністю домовленості щодо постачання в Україну необхідних обсягів пального. На квітень і травень обсяги забезпечені. Друге: вже на цей тиждень готуємо зустріч у форматі енергетичного «Рамштайну», і маємо прискорити отримання необхідного фінансування для відновлювальних...

The command of the Armed Forces of Ukraine clearly understands what exactly the enemy is planning and what priorities are set for the Russian army by the political leadership of Russia. We will counter. Unfortunately, the reduction of sanctions and political pressure from our partners on the aggressor was affected by a partial increase in Russian military ambitions. We will counter. Unfortunately, the reduction of sanctions and political pressure from our partners on the aggressor was affected by a partial increase in Russian military ambitions. description_uk: Детально аналізуємо оновлені російські плани війни. Командування Збройних Сил України чітко розуміє, що саме планує ворог та які пріоритети визначені для російської армії політичним керівництвом Росії. Будемо протидіяти. На жаль, зменшення санкційного та політичного тиску від наших партнерів на агресора позначилося частковим зростанням російських військових амбіцій. Але наші далекобійні санкції,...

title: Kyiv: 143 drones intercepted
title_en: Kyiv: 143 drones intercepted
title_uk: Київ: перехоплено 143 дрони
description: At least 6 killed, 59 injured in Russian strikes across Ukraine over past day Russian forces launched 143 drones against Ukraine overnight, of which 116 were downed or jammed, the Air Force reported on April 21. Russia also launched two Iskander-M ballistic missiles, one of which was intercepted by Ukraine's air defense.
description_en: At least 6 killed, 59 injured in Russian strikes across Ukraine over past day Russian forces launched 143 drones against Ukraine overnight, of which 116 were downed or jammed, the Air Force reported on April 21. Russia also launched two Iskander-M ballistic missiles, one of which was intercepted by Ukraine's air defense.
